case_title: RICARDO J. MEMBRENO VS. HAIR CLUB FOR MEN LTD. INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALICE KOO--MANAGING DIRECTOR/ SF CENTER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.
